title: SimCorp Dimension Instrument
description: Schema for a financial instrument entity in the SimCorp Integration Model (SIM). Instruments represent securities and financial products managed within SimCorp Dimension, covering equities, fixed income, derivatives, alternatives, funds, and structured products. Each instrument entity can have well over 100 data fields. Based on the SimCorp Dimension data model documented at thesim.dev and simcorp.com.

instrumentId.description: Unique internal identifier for the instrument within SimCorp Dimension

instrumentCode.description: Short alphanumeric code uniquely identifying the instrument in the system

instrumentName.description: Full descriptive name of the instrument

instrumentType.description: Primary classification of the instrument by asset type

instrumentStatus.description: Current lifecycle status of the instrument

identifiers.description: Standard market identifiers for the instrument

cusip.description: CUSIP identifier for North American securities

sedol.description: SEDOL identifier for UK and Irish securities

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code of the instrument denomination

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the instrument domicile or issuer country

issuer.description: Information about the entity that issued the instrument

issuerName.description: Full legal name of the issuer

issuerCountry.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the issuer

creditRating.description: Credit rating of the issuer from a recognized rating agency

exchange.description: Primary exchange or trading venue information

exchangeName.description: Name of the exchange or trading venue

listingDate.description: Date the instrument was first listed on this exchange

delistingDate.description: Date the instrument was delisted, null if still listed

equityDetails.description: Additional attributes specific to equity instruments (common shares, preferred shares, depository receipts)

sharesOutstanding.description: Total number of shares currently outstanding

marketCapitalization.description: Total market capitalization in instrument currency

dividendCurrency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for dividend payments

votingRightsPerShare.description: Number of voting rights per share

fixedIncomeDetails.description: Additional attributes specific to fixed income instruments (bonds, notes, bills)

couponRate.description: Annual coupon rate as a percentage

dayCountConvention.description: Day count convention used for interest calculations

maturityDate.description: Date when the instrument matures and principal is repaid

issueDate.description: Date when the instrument was originally issued

issuePrice.description: Price at which the instrument was originally issued, as a percentage of par

parValue.description: Face value or nominal amount per unit

redemptionPrice.description: Price at which the bond will be redeemed at maturity, as a percentage of par

yieldToMaturity.description: Current yield to maturity as a percentage

callable.description: Whether the instrument has an embedded call option

callDate.description: Earliest date the bond can be called by the issuer

putable.description: Whether the instrument has an embedded put option

floatingRateIndex.description: Reference rate for floating rate instruments (e.g., SOFR, EURIBOR, SONIA)

spread.description: Spread over the reference rate in basis points for floating rate instruments

seniority.description: Seniority of the debt in the capital structure

derivativeDetails.description: Additional attributes specific to derivative instruments, managed through the XpressInstruments module in SimCorp Dimension

underlyingInstrumentCode.description: Code of the underlying instrument or reference entity

expirationDate.description: Date when the derivative contract expires

strikePrice.description: Strike or exercise price for options and warrants

contractSize.description: Number of units of the underlying per contract

optionType.description: Whether the option is a call or put

settlementType.description: How the derivative is settled at expiry

notionalAmount.description: Notional or nominal amount of the derivative contract

payLeg.description: Pay leg details for swap instruments

rate.description: Fixed rate or spread for the pay leg

referenceIndex.description: Reference rate index for floating leg

receiveLeg.description: Receive leg details for swap instruments

rate.description: Fixed rate or spread for the receive leg

referenceIndex.description: Reference rate index for floating leg

fundDetails.description: Additional attributes specific to fund instruments (mutual funds, ETFs, hedge funds)

fundManager.description: Name of the fund management company

navPerUnit.description: Net Asset Value per unit or share

navDate.description: Date of the most recent NAV calculation

totalNetAssets.description: Total net assets of the fund in fund currency

managementFee.description: Annual management fee as a percentage

performanceFee.description: Performance fee as a percentage, if applicable

subscriptionFrequency.description: Frequency at which subscriptions are accepted

redemptionFrequency.description: Frequency at which redemptions are processed

redemptionNoticeDays.description: Number of days notice required for redemption

lastPrice.description: Most recent price of the instrument

priceDate.description: Date of the most recent price

priceSource.description: Source or vendor providing the price data

ratings.description: Credit ratings from recognized rating agencies

rating.description: The credit rating value (e.g., AAA, Aa1, BBB+)

ratingDate.description: Date the rating was assigned or last updated

classifications.description: Classification codes and categories applied to the instrument for grouping, filtering, and regulatory reporting

esgData.description: Environmental, Social, and Governance data associated with the instrument

sftdrClassification.description: EU SFDR classification for the instrument

euTaxonomyAligned.description: Whether the instrument is aligned with EU Taxonomy

settlementDetails.description: Standard settlement information for the instrument

depository.description: Central securities depository holding the instrument

customProperties.description: User-defined custom fields extending the standard instrument attributes. SimCorp Dimension supports extensive user-defined fields for custom calculations and classifications.

createdDate.description: Timestamp when the instrument record was created in SimCorp Dimension

modifiedDate.description: Timestamp when the instrument record was last modified
